title: Weekly Vessel Valuations Report, December 07 2021
summary:
Main
in Weekly Vessel Valuations Report 07/12/2021
Image reference: 2021-12-07_weekly-vessel-valuations-report-december-07-2021_img1.png
Tanker: Tanker values have softened. VLCC New Coral (297,600 DWT, Jan 2010, Jiangnan Shanghai Changxing HI) sold to Aeolos Management for USD 38.50 mil, VV value USD 35.83 mil. MR2 Grazia (50,200 DWT, Nov 2010, CSSC OME) sold to Union Maritime for USD 14.90 mil, VV value USD 15.72 mil.
